Gucci Jackie Series Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie Series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap with red and green webbing add more styling possibilities to this small shoulder bag in light brown leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Light Brown Full Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm

items.name_en: 2025 Spring/Summer Collection Gucci 73 Series draws inspiration from a vintage bucket bag released in the same year as the collection name. This bag interprets the horsebit motif with modern aesthetics. It can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried as a handbag. Model 833665, Calfskin, Mini size: 18.5x20x8.5

items.name_en: 💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This small shoulder bag features a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This small shoulder bag features a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, inspired by the equestrian world.
Beige and white new GG monogram coated canvas
Beige leather trim with contrasting stitching
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommet adjustable handle; Height 16cm - 27cm
Interior: 1 open pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap (Height 47cm - 57cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 815218.
Dimensions: 24.5cm (W) x 16cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Color: Beige/Original leather.
Weight: approx. 0.25kg
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, handcrafted as a collectible choice for years to come. This medium shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new iconic collection, featuring a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, paying tribute to Gucci's history with the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Gold-tone Gucci script print
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommets on adjustable shoulder strap
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 815217.
Medium Dimensions: 37cm (W) x 23cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
The new Gucci Blondie bag features the brand's classic logo that first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This medium tote is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap.
Model: 815716.
Size: 32(L) x 17(H) x 10cm(D).
Color: Beige full leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
